title: 🔥本轮估值显著高于同期
body: 市场处于结构性磨底期。MVRV 报 1.45，虽低于历史 62% 的时间，但较上轮周期同期（2022-06）的 1.05 高出 38%。这意味着本轮牛熊转换的底部支撑位已大幅抬升，并未出现历史极端低估的恐慌定价。中性。底部抬高是否意味着下跌空间有限？
title_en: 🔥 Current valuations are significantly higher than the same period last cycle
body_en: The market is in a structural bottoming phase. MVRV sits at 1.45. While lower than 62% of historical readings, it’s 38% higher than the same point in the last cycle (June 2022). This implies the support floor for this cycle's transition has been significantly elevated; we aren't seeing the panic pricing typical of historical extreme undervaluations. Neutral. Does a higher floor mean limited downside?
